item.text: Writing the verdict body then posting via the helper in one chained command.

item.command: printf '%s' "Review PASSED - all checklist items verified" > /tmp/verdict-codex.md && bash scripts/post-verdict.sh 214 pass /tmp/verdict-codex.md codex 8cc4c347-aaaa-bbbb-cccc-444444444444 'openai.gpt-5.5'
